mapper.select:
select r.id, r.user_id, r.discussion_id, u.avatar, u.real_name as sender, CASE WHEN ur.code = 3 THEN 'admin' WHEN ur.code = 2 THEN 'teacher' ELSE 'student' END as role, r.parent_id, r.content, r.create_time, COALESCE(r.like_count, 0) as likeCount, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_like WHERE reply_id = r.id AND user_id = #{userId}) THEN true ELSE false END as liked, COALESCE(r.like_count, 0) as count, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT id FROM t_like WHERE reply_id = r.id AND user_id = #{userId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isLike from t_reply as r join t_user as u on u.id = r.user_id left join t_role as ur on u.role_id = ur.id where r.discussion_id = #{discussionId} and r.parent_id = -1
order by r.create_time asc
order by r.create_time desc
order by r.like_count asc
order by r.like_count desc

select r.id, r.user_id, u.avatar, u.real_name as sender, CASE WHEN ur.code = 3 THEN 'admin' WHEN ur.code = 2 THEN 'teacher' ELSE 'student' END as role, r.content, r.parent_id, r.create_time, COALESCE(r.like_count, 0) as likeCount, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t_like WHERE reply_id = r.id AND user_id = #{userId}) THEN true ELSE false END as liked, COALESCE(r.like_count, 0) as count, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT id FROM t_like WHERE reply_id = r.id AND user_id = #{userId}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as isLike from t_reply as r join t_user as u on u.id = r.user_id left join t_role as ur on u.role_id = ur.id where r.parent_id = #{replyId} order by r.create_time desc
